title: 奇怪的事情：人工智能和自主武器的未来（播客）
summary: The last big story right before the war in Iran started was the collapse in the relationship between the Pentagon and Anthropic, with the latter objecting to any potential use of its models in either fully autonomous weapons or domestic surveillance. Of course, this story immediately become more relevant with the start of the war, and the reporting that Anthropic’s technology was in fact utilized at the start of hostilities. But what does that mean? How are these models used? And what would a fu（原题：Odd Lots: AI and the Future of Autonomous Weapons (Podcast)）

title: 人择、五角大楼和自主武器的未来
summary: How AI will reshape warfare.（原题：Anthropic, the Pentagon, and the Future of Autonomous Weapons）

title: Mind Robotics 筹集 A 轮融资以开发人工智能驱动的工业自动化
summary: Mind Robotics has raised millions of dollars to apply production data to AI robots with human-like dexterity, adaptability, and reasoning. title: VDMA：VDA 5050 V3 将帮助移动机器人车队规模化
summary: Version 3 of the VDA 5050 communications framework serves as a toolkit for mixed fleets of mobile robots, says German association VDMA. title: IntBot 人形机器人在圣何塞机场迎接游客
summary: San José Mineta International Airport has deployed Jose, a multilingual IntBot humanoid, to provide real-time traveler assistance. title: AI 机器人实验室正在洽谈融资 10 亿美元，估值达 110 亿美元
summary: Physical Intelligence, a two-year-old robotics startup founded by AI academics and former Google DeepMind researchers, is discussing a new funding round of about $1 billion that would bring the company’s valuation to more than $11 billion including dollars raised, according to people familiar with the matter.（原题：AI Robotics Lab in Talks to Raise $1 Billion at $11 Billion Valuation）
